title: Add exact-SHA release gate workflow
outOfScope: Changing release.json or historical v0.5.24 evidence
Adding a new GitHub Action dependency
Creating a tag or GitHub Release during local verification

sources.reason: Required smoke workflow name and gate.
Required compatibility workflow name and gate.
Release tag contract checked by the workflow.

riskAssessment.reason: The workflow can create immutable external release state, so exact-SHA and precondition checks must fail closed.

executionDecision.reason: The workflow is explicit, manually dispatched, and preserves existing supply-chain evidence inputs.

preReviewWarnings: Review every external-state precondition and confirm no new Action dependency is introduced.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Manual dispatch requires a new tag and source commit and rejects an existing tag.
The workflow requires source commit == workflow commit and successful smoke/compatibility runs for that exact SHA.
The workflow validates release.json tag identity before creating the tag and GitHub Release.
The workflow adds no GitHub Action occurrence and preserves historical v0.5.24 evidence.
Workflow tests and all project/governance checks pass.
guidelines: Release creation must be fail-closed before external state mutation.
Supply-chain workflow changes must not add unpinned or new Action dependencies.

intent.problem: The repository now has green smoke and compatibility evidence but no formal release workflow that binds tag creation to one verified commit SHA.
constraints: Preserve the immutable v0.5.24 release and its SBOM/provenance digests.
Do not add a new GitHub Action dependency because Action occurrences are part of the published SBOM.
Do not create external release state during local tests.
intent.rationale: A CLI-only manual workflow can enforce exact-SHA release evidence without changing historical supply-chain claims.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: dispatch rejects a source commit different from the workflow SHA
dispatch requires successful smoke and compatibility runs for the exact SHA
release creation uses gh CLI without adding a GitHub Action dependency

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the formal release workflow follow-up.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
